title: To Margot
content:
When I go free,
 I think 'twill be
 A night of stars and snow,
 And the wild fires of frost shall light
 My footsteps as I go;
 Nobody - nobody will be there
 With groping touch, or sight,
 To see me in my bush of hair
 Dance burning through the night.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter De La Mare delivers a powerful performance in "To Margot"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
